name: Farmers State Bank
description_short: 115 Shelbyville Street in Center, TX houses Farmers State Bank, serving local banking needs.
description_long:
Farmers State Bank's Center, TX location sits at 115 Shelbyville Street, providing a dedicated banking facility for residents in this area of Texas. The branch operates as a full-service bank, offering customers a physical location to handle their financial transactions in Center.

At this Center location, customers can access standard banking services including deposits, withdrawals, account management, and consultation with banking professionals. For specific service details or appointment scheduling at the 115 Shelbyville Street branch in Center, TX, contacting the branch directly is recommended.

For Center residents seeking reliable banking services, Farmers State Bank on Shelbyville Street provides a trusted local option. When visiting, bring government-issued ID and any relevant account information.
services: Certificates of Deposit (91 days to 5 years)
Mobile banking with mobile check deposit
UChoose Rewards Visa debit cards with cash-back
ATM access and night deposit facilities
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Specialized agricultural and commercial lending products designed for farmers and business owners
Multiple branch locations across East Texas plus LPOs in Franklin and Nacogdoches for local access
Comprehensive digital banking including mobile check deposit and text banking capabilities
UChoose Rewards debit card program with cash-back rewards on all Visa purchases
CDs with flexible terms from 91 days to 5 years and FDIC insurance protection
24-hour phone banking for account access and support outside branch hours
cons: Website lacks specific interest rates, APYs, or fee schedules—requires direct contact for pricing
Limited geographic footprint (primarily East Texas) reduces convenience for customers outside service area
No information about loan approval rates, processing times, or specific loan amount ranges available online
Minimal transparency on mortgage rates, terms, or whether FHA/VA loans are offered despite 'mortgage options' messaging
Education Center referenced but content not visible—actual financial education resources unclear
best_for: Agricultural business owners and farmers seeking specialized lending products and local relationships
Small business owners in East Texas needing commercial loans and business banking services
Conservative savers interested in FDIC-insured CDs and certificates with flexible maturity options
Existing residents of FSB service areas (Center, Carthage, Joaquin, Shelbyville, Franklin, Nacogdoches) prioritizing branch convenience
diagnosis: Farmers State Bank is best suited for agricultural and small business customers in East Texas who value local relationships and specialized lending expertise, and for conservative savers seeking FDIC-insured products. The main caveat is lack of online pricing transparency—consumers cannot evaluate rates or fees without contacting the bank directly, and geographic limitation to East Texas reduces accessibility for most consumers.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Center, TX's Farmers State Bank at 115 Shelbyville Street. Local banking services.
